features: PROFESSIONAL CLEAN: Experience a professional clean feeling every day with the Oral B electric toothbrush for children, featuring 360 degree visible gum pressure control for a guided brushing experience
GENTLE YET EFFECTIVE: The electric toothbrush for ages 6-12 has extra thin soft bristle tips for a gentle yet effective clean, perfect for sensitive young gums
SMART TIMING: The Oral B electric toothbrush pauses every 30 seconds to alert your child to change the area that's being brushed, promoting good brushing habits
VERSATILE MODES: With 3 brushing modes - daily clean, sensitive and polish, the electric toothbrush caters to all your child's oral care needs
LONG-LASTING BATTERY: This rechargeable toothbrush for ages 6-12 has a long-lasting battery and charge indicator, ensuring it's always ready when your child needs it
description: Product Description The Oral-B Junior Star Wars electric toothbrush for ages 6+ is designed with dentists for a superior clean. To protect children's gentle gums, it has a 360 ̊ Gum Pressure Control which flashes a red light and reduces brushing speed when it detects brushing that's too hard. Plus, its round brush head has extra-soft bristles. To make brushing even more fun, it can be used with the free Disney Magic Timer App from Oral-B. In fact, 90% of kids brush longer with the app. It's the right brush to help kids brush independently and develop healthy brushing habits to last a lifetime. Safety Warning Periodically check the entire product/cords/accessories for damage. A damaged or non-functioning unit should no longer be used. If the product/ cords/accessories are damaged, take it to an Oral-B Service Centre. Do not modify or repair the product. This may cause fire, electric shock or injury. Usage by children under age 3 is not recommended. Toothbrushes can be used by children and persons with reduced physical, sensory or mental capabilities or lack of experience and knowledge, if they have been given supervision or instruction concerning use of the appliance in a safe way and understand the hazards involved. Cleaning and maintenance shall not be performed by children. Children shall not play with the appliance. Use this product only for its intended use as described in then instruction manual. Do not use attachments which are not recommended by the manufacturer.
